steps.title: Clarify what sequence to recount
steps.content: The phrase “recount the sequence of events proposed by the researchers” asks us to describe the historical events the researchers believe occurred—not the steps of their research process.

steps.title: Match the proposed sequence
steps.content: Choice C directly sequences the actual events: Chrysalis came close to Saturn, tidal forces broke it apart, and its debris formed the rings. The others either contradict this causality, present only theory without the specific sequence, or describe research methodology instead of proposed events. That matches choice C — C is correct.
